questions.question:
Should this draft replace/merge with the existing open README scannability ticket, or create a separate narrower follow-up focused only on layout?

Why it matters: There is already an open task for cleaning up README scannability plus several placeholder README draft tickets. The implementation-ready ticket needs a clear relationship so the board does not produce duplicate documentation work.
Recommended answer: Treat this as a narrower follow-up or replacement for `tkt_01krp7q90j7610hnpnekdraxbr`, focused specifically on README layout and visual structure; close or supersede duplicate placeholder drafts.
